t-1.notes: feature: deferred triage · Deferred.Dismissed @ internal/phase/phase.go · third 'dismissed' state (bool) on deferred items, distinct from someday/routed

t-2.notes: feature: deferred triage · deferredDismiss @ internal/cmd/deferred.go · dross deferred dismiss <src> <idx> retires a someday item (--undo reverses); errors on routed items

t-3.notes: feature: deferred triage · deferredList --dismissed @ internal/cmd/deferred.go · hides dismissed items from someday/default, surfaces via --dismissed, renders (dismissed) in TARGET

t-4.notes: feature: inbox triage · inbox.md §0 + dismiss funnel @ assets/prompts/inbox.md · board-off repos skip the board source and still triage deferred items; dismiss funnel invokes dross deferred dismiss
